day5_after_escaped.name: Me
day5_after_escaped.text: *Outside the school. Rain is falling. For the first time... I'm breathing air outside these walls.*

day5_after_escaped_2.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_2.text: *I ran. Anywhere. As far from this school as possible.*

day5_after_escaped_4.name: Me
day5_after_escaped_4.text: *This evidence needs to reach the world. Right now.*

day5_after_police.name: Me
day5_after_police.text: *I called the police. My voice was shaking, but I explained everything. I submitted the memory card and photos as evidence.*

day5_after_police_2.name: Me
day5_after_police_2.text: *Police dispatched. Sirens wailing in the direction of the school.*

day5_after_expose_online.name: Me
day5_after_expose_online.text: *Connected to a convenience store's WiFi. Uploading every photo and document. Social media, news tips, forums...*

day5_after_captured.name: Me
day5_after_captured.text: *...I opened my eyes. The basement. Fluorescent lights flickering.*

day5_after_captured_2.name: Me
day5_after_captured_2.text: *My hands are bound. Seated in a chair. ...Is it over?*

day5_after_captured_4.name: School Nurse
day5_after_captured_4.text: "I'll prep the final checkup. Just a blood draw and an IV, that's all."

day5_after_captured_resist.name: Me
day5_after_captured_resist.text: *I knocked the chair over! Rising with bound hands.*

day5_after_captured_resist_3.name: Me
day5_after_captured_resist_3.text: *Sudden blackout. The basement plunges into darkness. In the chaos... I found the exit.*

day5_after_captured_submit.name: School Nurse
day5_after_captured_submit.text: "Good. It'll be over soon. You'll forget everything."

day5_after_captured_submit_2.name: Me
day5_after_captured_submit_2.text: *The needle touches my arm. Consciousness... fading...*

day5_after_stayed.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_after_stayed.text: "...You made the right choice, {name}. This is how it should be."

day5_after_stayed_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_after_stayed_2.text: "I'll protect you. You don't need to worry about anything."

day5_after_stayed_4.name: Me
day5_after_stayed_4.text: *Ms. Eunsu is smiling. A warm smile. ...Was this smile always this terrifying?*
